mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_TB_POST.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TB_POST ( POST_ID, MEMBER_NO, BOARD_TYPE, TITLE, BODY, REGION, STATUS_CD, REG_DATE, TAGS, VIEW_COUNT, LIKE_CNT ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{memberNo}, #{boardType}, #{title}, #{body}, #{region}, #{statusCd}, SYSDATE, #{tags}, 0, 0 )
mapper.sql: POST_ID AS postId, MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, TITLE AS title, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(BODY, 32000, 1) AS body, LOST_LAT AS lostLat, LOST_LNG AS lostLng, LOST_CONTACT AS lostContact, REGION AS region, STATUS_CD AS statusCd, REG_DATE AS regDate, TAGS AS tags, VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, LIKE_CNT AS likeCnt
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM TB_POST WHERE POST_ID = #{postId} AND BOARD_TYPE IN ('TOWN', 'LIFE', 'SHARE')

SELECT
FROM TB_POST WHERE STATUS_CD = 'ACTIVE'
AND BOARD_TYPE IN ('TOWN', 'LIFE', 'SHARE')
AND BOARD_TYPE = #{boardType}
ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_TB_FILE.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TB_FILE ( FILE_ID, REF_TYPE, REF_ID, DRIVE_FILE_ID, FILE_URL, ORIGIN_NAME, REG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{fileId}, #{refType}, #{refId}, #{driveFileId}, #{fileUrl}, #{originName}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT FILE_URL FROM TB_FILE WHERE REF_TYPE = 'POST' AND REF_ID = #{postId} ORDER BY FILE_ID
